app.name: OpenCLI
app.one_liner: A universal CLI hub that transforms any website, Electron app, or local tool into a standardized command-line interface for AI agents and developers.

screens.name: CLI Hub Interface
screens.purpose: Provide a terminal-based entry point for executing commands across websites, Electron apps, and local tools with seamless session reuse and AI agent integration.
primary_actions: Execute registered external CLIs (e.g., gh, docker) with auto-install
Invoke AI discovery commands like `explore`, `synthesize`, and `cascade`
Run built-in site adapters (e.g., Twitter, Spotify, 小红书)

rust_commands.name: list_items
rust_commands.purpose: Enumerate available tools and adapters for AI agent discovery via `opencli list`.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist user data or media from supported platforms (e.g., download Twitter/X content).

mvp_plan: week 1: Add `opencli register` and auto-install logic for external CLIs
week 1: Implement core adapter loader for .ts/.yaml files
week 1: Integrate Chrome session reuse with anti-detection patches
acceptance_tests: Confirm `opencli list` returns all built-in and registered commands for AI agent consumption.
Verify `opencli twitter download` succeeds without authentication errors (currently failing per open issue).
